$5 Billion Flows Into Top Growth ETFs VUG, IWF and IWV

holdings.infoBox: IWV is an equity ETF with a total of 2567 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 6.86%, Apple at 5.90%, Microsoft at 4.09%, Amazon.com at 3.26%, and Alphabet at 2.97%.

overview.description: The iShares Russell 3000 ETF (IWV) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Russell 3000 index. The fund tracks a cap-weighted index that measures the investable US equities market, covering the entire market-cap spectrum, including micro-caps. IWV was launched on May 22, 2000 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.text: Opendoor Technologies’ ($OPEN) shares jumped by over 10% on Wednesday morning after the online residential real estate company announced its inclusion in the Russell 3000 index ($IWV). It marks a…

data.title: MarketWatch Premium: These investment newsletters' favorite value stocks have widely outpaced growth stocks
data.text: The "value" proposition still holds: Since November, the return on a basket of value stocks totals 53% compared with only 11% for the S&P 500.

data.title: $5 Billion Flows Into Top Growth ETFs VUG, IWF and IWV
data.text: While the S&P 500 has exhibited sharp volatility, investors have been plowing into Growth ETFs.
